title: Phippsia phryganodes

The plant is classified as a member of the genus Phippsia, which is part of the larger family Caryophyllaceae. The Caryophyllaceae family includes over 2,000 species of flowering plants, many of which are found in alpine and arctic regions. Phippsia phryganodes is a rare and unique species, with limited information available about its classification and characteristics.
